framework.name: OpenID Foundation Agentic AI Identity Whitepaper
framework.description: OpenID Foundation published a comprehensive whitepaper (Oct 2025, lead editor Tobin South) positioning OAuth 2.1 as the baseline for agent auth within single trust domains, while identifying critical gaps for cross-domain, autonomous, and async agent scenarios. This is the OpenID Foundation's direct play into the agent identity space.
framework.raw_quote: Existing OAuth 2.1 frameworks, when used with AI agents, work well within single trust domains with synchronous agent operations... but may fall short in scenarios that are cross-domain, highly autonomous, or asynchronous

source.title: Identity Management for Agentic AI - OpenID
